title: Crepidopteris australiensis

The genus Crepidopteris is further divided into several species, including C. australiensis, which is native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
